understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete each level by moving selectable pieces onto all goal tiles simultaneously. The overall game is won when all levels are finished, using a limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece in pixel-grid coordinates (3 pixels per cell). CLICK actions switch selection to another selectable piece at a specified grid position, but only if the click coordinates match an existing selectable piece's position and the piece is reachable; otherwise the action fails. Pushable objects (blocks) can be shoved if adjacent in the movement direction, while walls block movement in ways discovered through interaction. The semantic grid uses symbols (P=selected, S=other selectable, B=block, #=wall, +=goal, .=empty) for planning.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete each level by moving selectable pieces onto all goal tiles simultaneously. The overall game is won when all levels are finished, using a limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece in pixel-grid coordinates (3 pixels per cell). CLICK actions switch selection to another selectable piece at a specified grid position, but only if the click coordinates match an existing selectable piece's position and the piece is reachable; otherwise the action fails. Pushable objects (blocks) can be shoved if adjacent in the movement direction, while walls block movement in ways discovered through interaction. The semantic grid uses symbols (P=selected, S=other selectable, B=block, #=wall, +=goal, .=empty) for planning.
